doc_1781608355698_czx8nrg34.fullText:
Vrund Patel
Software Engineer | Full Stack Developer | Cloud & DevOps
 +91 76989 79593| # vrundpatel153@gmail.com|ï LinkedIn|§ GitHub|Ð LeetCode|  Portfolio
Summary
Full-Stack Developer with hands-on experience building and deploying scalable web applications using the MERN Stack, Next.js,
and TypeScript. Familiar with Docker containerisation, CI/CD concepts, cloud deployment on AWS and GCP, and version control
workflows via Git/GitHub. Comfortable working across the full SDLC — from frontend to backend to cloud deployment — and
eager to deepen expertise in DevOps tooling, pipeline automation, and cloud infrastructure.
Education
Charotar University of Science and TechnologyAug 2023 – Jul 2027 (Expected)
B.Tech in Computer EngineeringChanga, Anand, Gujarat
Experience
Full-Stack Developer InternMay 2025 – Jul 2025
TLK IndustriesRemote
• Contributed to the end-to-end development of a Bank Management System (MERN stack), following coding standards and best
practices across frontend and backend.
• Built authentication, authorisation, and protected routes for secure application access; collaborated with the team on client-facing
workflows and re-prioritised tasks as project needs shifted.
Projects
AI-Suite — Full-Stack AI Platform§Aug – Oct 2025
Stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React.js, Supabase, Pinecone, Groq API, Docker
• Containerised the full application with Docker for consistent, reproducible deployments across environments; managed
multi-service setup end-to-end.
• Built real-time chat, voice assistant, and multi-step AI agent pipelines with cloud-hosted Pinecone and Supabase as the production
backend.
FullGravityStudio — AI-Powered Browser IDE§2025
Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Convex, Inngest, GitHub API, Clerk Auth, WebContainers
• Implemented async job processing with Inngest for background task orchestration, mirroring CI/CD event-driven pipeline
patterns.
• Integrated GitHub import/export for version control automation; delivered OAuth, live preview, integrated terminal, and multi-file
project templating.
TrackX — Full-Stack Expense Tracker Dec 2024 – Jan 2025
Stack: TypeScript, React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Tailwind CSS
• Designed and deployed a production full-stack app end-to-end; built REST APIs, reminder scheduling, AI chat assistant, and
data export features.
Technical Skills
• Cloud & DevOps: AWS (EC2, S3), Google Cloud Platform, Docker, Git/GitHub, CI/CD (concepts), Inngest
• Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, SQL
• Frontend: React.js, Tailwind CSS
• Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs
• Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase, Convex, Pinecone, Firebase
• Tools: Postman, Figma, Power BI, Anaconda
Achievements
• 1st Runners-Up — Oceanlab × Charusat Hackathon [View Certificate]
• Grand Finalist — Odoo Hackathon 2025 (national-level)
• Finalist — Smart India Hackathon (SIH) 2025 Final Round
Certifications
• AWS Cloud Developing — AWS Academy Graduate [View]
• Full Stack Developer Intern — Micro1 [View]
• HackerRank — JavaScript (Intermediate) [View]
• Technology Job Simulation — Deloitte (Forage) [View]
• Nuts and Bolts of Machine Learning — Coursera [View]
Soft Skills
Languages: English (Proficient) | Hindi (Proficient) | Gujarati (Proficient)
Teamwork & Agility:  Team leader in hackathons; comfortable working across teams and re-prioritising in dynamic project
environments.

doc_1781608558243_u3501rumq.name: resume (5).pdf
doc_1781608558243_u3501rumq.fullText:
Vrund Patel
Full Stack Developer | Web & Backend Systems
 +91 76989 79593| # vrundpatel153@gmail.com|ï LinkedIn|§ GitHub|Ð LeetCode|  Portfolio
Summary
Full-Stack Developer with hands-on experience building scalable web applications using MERN Stack, Next.js and TypeScript.
Skilled in designing RESTful APIs, building AI agents, working with relational and NoSQL databases, and learning to build dis-
tributed backend systems with Spring Boot and Kafka. Passionate about learning different technologies and delivering polished user
experiences from frontend to production-ready backend.
Education
Charotar University of Science and TechnologyAug 2023 – Jul 2027 (Expected)
B.Tech in Computer EngineeringChanga, Anand, Gujarat
Infinity SchoolJun 2021 – Mar 2023
Higher Secondary Graduation (Science)Lunawada, Mahisagar, Gujarat
Experience
Full-Stack Developer InternMay 2025 – Jul 2025
TLK IndustriesRemote
• Contributed to a Bank Management System, building full-stack features using the MERN stack with a focus on backend logic
and database operations.
• Worked with the dataflow and enhanced UI components for day-to-day operational workflows.
• Contributed to authentication, authorisation, and protected routes to ensure secure end-to-end application access.
Projects
FullGravityStudio — AI-Powered Browser IDE§2025
Tech Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Convex, Inngest, Groq API, WebContainers, Clerk Auth, CodeMirror, Tailwind CSS, GitHub API
• Built a browser-based AI IDE with chat-driven code generation, inline suggestions, quick edits, and multi-file project scaffolding
via a tool-based AI agent pipeline.
• Implemented real-time file system with Convex, in-browser runtime via WebContainers, integrated terminal, live preview, and
project templates for full-stack app development.
• Added GitHub import/export, multi-conversation AI workspace, async job processing with Inngest, OAuth via Clerk, and a
modular editor with syntax highlighting and auto-completion.
AI-Suite — Full-Stack AI Assistant Platform§Aug 2025 – Oct 2025
Tech Stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React.js, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Pinecone, Groq API, Docker
• Built a full-stack AI assistant platform with 3D models, immersive animations, real-time chat and voice assistant along with Chat
with PDF and image generation capabilities.
• Integrated chat and voice assistants using Groq and built AI agents for multi-step task automation with context-aware history
management.
• Containerized the full application using Docker and leveraged fine-tuned models for efficient, scalable agent execution.
TrackX — Full-Stack Expense Tracker Dec 2024 – Jan 2025
Tech Stack: TypeScript, React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Tailwind CSS, Git
• Designed and built a full-stack Expense Tracker with a fully responsive interface featuring interactive graph visualisation.
• Built features including reminder scheduling, an AI chat assistant using OpenAI, data export, and complete history management.
Technical Skills
• Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, SQL
• Frontend: React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS
• Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs
• Databases: PostgreSQL, Convex, Pinecone, MongoDB, Supabase, Firebase, Neon
• Cloud & DevOps: Google Cloud Platform, AWS Cloud, Docker, Git, GitHub
• Tools: Postman, Inngest, Anaconda, Power BI, Canva, Figma
Achievements
• 1st Runners-Up — Oceanlab × Charusat Hackathon [View Certificate]
• Grand Finalist — Odoo Hackathon 2025 (national-level competition)
• Finalist — Smart India Hackathon (SIH) 2025 Final Round
Certifications
• AWS Cloud Developing — AWS Academy Graduate [View Credentials]
• Full Stack Developer Intern — Micro1 [View Credentials]
• HackerRank Certification — JavaScript (Intermediate) [View Credentials]
• Technology Job Simulation — Deloitte (Forage) [View Credentials]
• Nuts and Bolts of Machine Learning — Advanced Course, Coursera [View Credentials]
Soft Skills
Languages: English (Proficient) | Hindi (Proficient) | Gujarati (Proficient)
Communication: Effective verbal and written communication in academic projects and group collaborations.
Teamwork: Collaborative team leader in hackathons, coding projects and group assignments.
